reasons: direct beneficiary of AI capex on memory side
mentions.text:
@ShinY27403 AI is not bubble, but has some pocket-like elements of it like 1T promised capex by OpenAI and distorted valuations from energy ( $OKLO ).

Aside from OpenAI, funding for AI capex on the Neocloud side comes from the most profitable companies in the world like $msft, $meta, $googl, $amzn and this is not a bubble. 

A lot are direct beneficiaries like dc $NBIS, chips like $amd $nvda, fab $TSM Samsung, connectivity like $alab $crdo, memory like $MU, $SDNK, etc.

With neoclouds you have 5Y contract visibility from hyperscalers, which has guaranteed revenue based on execution of DC buildout.

It’s completely not the same as $ORCL and $CRWV being promised X amount by OpenAI which doesn’t have the funding. 

But all other good companies like $CRDO to $CIFR to $NBIS gets caught in the selloff just due to panic and misunderstanding.

However fundamentals will catch up to the stock price once the indiscriminate panic selling stops.
